items.definition_en: A broom is a tool used for sweeping floors.
items.example_en: She uses a broom to clean the kitchen.

items.definition_en: A bucket is a container used for carrying liquids.
items.example_en: He filled the bucket with water.

items.definition_en: A mop is used to wash floors.
items.example_en: She cleaned the floor with a wet mop.

items.definition_en: A dustpan is used to collect dust and dirt from the floor.
items.example_en: He swept the dirt into the dustpan.

items.definition_en: A sponge is used for cleaning or washing surfaces.
items.example_en: She wiped the table with a sponge.

items.definition_en: A plunger is used to clear blockages in drains or toilets.
items.example_en: He used a plunger to fix the sink.

items.definition_en: A watering can is used to water plants.
items.example_en: She used a watering can in the garden.

items.definition_en: A screwdriver is a tool for turning screws.
items.example_en: I need a screwdriver to fix this chair.

items.definition_en: A hammer is used for hitting nails into wood.
items.example_en: He used a hammer to build the shelf.

items.definition_en: A nail is a small metal stick for joining things together.
items.example_en: She put a nail in the wall to hang the picture.

items.definition_en: A saw is a tool for cutting wood or other material.
items.example_en: He used the saw to cut the plank.

items.definition_en: A tape measure is used for measuring length.
items.example_en: She used a tape measure before cutting the fabric.

items.definition_en: A paintbrush is used for putting paint on things.
items.example_en: He painted the wall with a paintbrush.

items.definition_en: A toolbox is a container for keeping tools.
items.example_en: He keeps his tools in a toolbox.

items.definition_en: Pliers are a tool for holding and bending things.
items.example_en: She used pliers to fix the wire.

items.definition_en: A wrench is used for turning nuts and bolts.
items.example_en: He fixed his bicycle with a wrench.

items.definition_en: A ladder is used for climbing up to reach high places.
items.example_en: She used a ladder to change the light bulb.

items.definition_en: A light bulb gives light when electricity flows through it.
items.example_en: He replaced the old light bulb in the lamp.

items.definition_en: A fuse is a small safety device in electrical circuits.
items.example_en: She changed the fuse after the power went out.

items.definition_en: Glue is used to stick things together.
items.example_en: He used glue to fix the broken plate.
